reason: Successfully navigated to the SuperAgent application, found and clicked the "QA-20260415-220626-3ftg" agent, verified its status, sent a math question, received the correct response, and verified the response contains "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing 3 agents including "QA-20260415-220626-3ftg" with status "idle"
Clicked on the "QA-20260415-220626-3ftg" agent in the sidebar - Agent detail page opened, showing the agent name and status indicator displaying "idle"
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status confirmed as "idle" ✓
Clicked on message input field - Input field became active and focused
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message successfully entered into the text input field
Clicked Send message button - Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", a new session "Math Basics Question Session" was created, and activity indicator showed "Working..."
Waited for response - Response received within 2 seconds as shown by "Worked for 2s" indicator
Verified response mentions "4" - Agent response shows exactly "4" ✓
Took screenshot showing final state - Screenshot 03-final-response-received.png captures the complete conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4"
